query: UPDATE allocation_runs SET status = 'unallocated' WHERE status = 'confirmed' AND allocatedCount = 0 AND id IN (SELECT DISTINCT runId FROM allocation_run_orders WHERE status = 'unallocated') AND id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT runId FROM allocation_run_orders WHERE status = 'allocated');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4NCq8mAsshAuKGA.2865343ca485 --database K5ogkLhSXtccCnqH4Vm3fs --execute UPDATE allocation_runs SET status = 'unallocated' WHERE status = 'confirmed' AND allocatedCount = 0 AND id IN (SELECT DISTINCT runId FROM allocation_run_orders WHERE status = 'unallocated') AND id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT runId FROM allocation_run_orders WHERE status = 'allocated');
